templateMetadata.description: Personal quota tracking: attainment, pacing, pipeline health, deals needed to close gap
templateMetadata.useCase: Track personal quota progress, forecast personal performance, know where you stand

components.title: My Pacing (Am I On Track?)
components.tooltip: Compares your attainment % to % of quarter elapsed

components.title: Deals Needed to Close Gap
components.tooltip: Based on your average deal size

components.title: My Quarterly Progress
components.projectionLine: Estimated finish based on current pace

components.title: My Path to Quota (Deals Closing This Quarter)

calculatedFieldsRequired.description: Rep's quarterly quota (set by manager or from Quota object)

calculatedFieldsRequired.formula: SUM(Opportunity.Amount WHERE IsWon=TRUE AND CloseDate=THIS_QUARTER AND OwnerId=$User.Id)

calculatedFieldsRequired.description: Dollar amount still needed to hit quota
Average size of closed won deals this quarter

steps: 1. Set up quota management (User field or Quota object)
2. Create rollup summaries or scheduled jobs to calculate quarterly metrics
4. Create all 7 source reports using templates
5. Add report filter: OwnerId = $User.Id (shows only logged-in user's records)
6. Create dashboard in Dashboards folder (My Dashboards)
9. Set refresh schedule to daily at 6 AM
10. Make dashboard personal (not shared) or share with all reps
11. Pin dashboard to Home Page for easy access

quotaManagement.option3: Custom Quota__c object with User lookup

questions: Am I on track to hit quota this quarter?
How much do I have left to close?
How many deals do I need to close the gap?
actions: Review path-to-quota table and prioritize high-probability deals
If coverage <2x, focus on pipeline generation

midQuarter.focus: Quarterly progress chart, deals needed metric
questions: Am I tracking to finish strong?
Do I need to pull deals forward from next quarter?
Should I ask for help from manager?
actions: If <50% attainment, escalate at-risk deals to manager
If >50% attainment but low coverage, double down on prospecting
Review path-to-quota and identify deals that might slip

questions: What deals are at risk of slipping?
Do I need discount approval or exec support?
actions: Focus 100% on deals closing this quarter
Push low-probability deals to next quarter (realism)

quotaAttainment.benchmark: 100% = on target, 80-90% = needs attention, <70% = at risk
quotaAttainment.whyItMatters: Primary measure of personal sales performance

pacing.whyItMatters: Leading indicator of whether you'll hit quota by quarter end

coverageRatio.whyItMatters: Indicates likelihood of closing quota gap

warningTriggers: <50% attainment at mid-quarter → "Talk to your manager"
Pacing <85% → "Increase activity or ask for help"

quotaManagement: Update deal stages and close dates religiously
Be realistic about close dates (don't sandbag or overcommit)
Focus on deals closing THIS quarter (don't get distracted)
proactiveActions: If behind pace at mid-quarter, escalate immediately
If ahead of pace, build next quarter's pipeline
If coverage low, dedicate time to prospecting
If high attainment but low pipeline, you're borrowing from future
commonMistakes: ❌ Ignoring quota dashboard until quarter end (too late)
❌ Overoptimistic pipeline (counting deals that won't close)
❌ Not asking for help when falling behind
❌ Celebrating early (quota hit but pipeline empty)

compensationTiers.note: Check your comp plan for specific thresholds
